description: Single config object emitted by proman-cicd-detect and passed as a JSON string to every reusable workflow.

build_devcontainer.description: Config slice for the build-devcontainer reusable workflow (multi-platform devcontainer image build and push).

enabled.description: Whether to rebuild the devcontainer image.

image_name.description: Full image name without tag, e.g. ghcr.io/org/repo-devcontainer.

image_tag.description: Image tag to push, e.g. 'latest' or 'branch-my-feature'.

tag_is_latest.description: True when image_tag == 'latest'; controls whether a sha-prefixed alias tag is also pushed.

config_dir.description: Repo-relative path to the devcontainer config directory.

userdata_dir.description: Absolute path used as the devcontainer userdata/cache folder on the runner.

cache_ref_prefix.description: Registry-side tag prefix used for buildx layer-cache refs.

registry.description: Container registry hostname used for docker/login-action.

build_matrix.description: Per-platform build jobs; each entry maps to one GHA matrix runner.

runner.description: GHA runs-on label for this platform.

platform.description: Docker platform string passed to buildx, e.g. linux/amd64.

platform_tag.description: Short suffix appended to the image tag for the per-arch manifest, e.g. linux-amd64.

build_features.description: Config slice for the build-features reusable workflow (feature source and distribution artifact build).

ci_image.description: Full devcontainer image URI used as the job container.

enabled.description: Whether to run the build-features job.

artifact_src.description: Artifact spec for the raw source tree uploaded for downstream jobs.

artifact_dist.description: Artifact spec for the distribution tarballs uploaded for release.

build_docs.description: Config slice for the build-docs reusable workflow (Sphinx documentation build).

ci_image.description: Full devcontainer image URI used as the job container.

enabled.description: Whether to run the build-docs job.

artifact.description: Artifact spec for the built docs archive uploaded for GitHub Pages deployment.

lint.description: Config slice for the lint reusable workflow (shell, JSON schema, and Python linting).

ci_image.description: Full devcontainer image URI used as the job container.

artifact_src_name.description: Name of the source artifact downloaded by all lint jobs.

artifact_src_path.description: Local path where the source artifact is extracted.

shell.description: Controls the shell-script linting job (shellcheck / shfmt).

validate.description: Controls the devcontainer-feature JSON schema validation job.

enabled.description: Whether to run JSON schema validation.

python.description: Controls the Python linting job (ruff check + format).

test_dev.description: Config slice for the test-dev reusable workflow (Python unit tests for proman dev tooling).

enabled.description: Whether to run the Python dev tests.

ci_image.description: Full devcontainer image URI used as the job container.

test_features.description: Config slice for the test-features reusable workflow (devcontainer feature integration tests).

enabled.description: Whether any feature tests should run; false when feature_matrix is empty.

feature_matrix.description: Per-feature test configuration objects; each entry is passed as inputs.config to test-features.yaml.

items.description: Self-contained configuration for a single feature's test jobs across all platforms.

artifact_src_name.description: Name of the source artifact downloaded by test jobs.

artifact_src_path.description: Local path where the source artifact is extracted.

ci_image.description: Full devcontainer image URI used as the DinD host container.

registry.description: Container registry hostname used for docker/login-action.

free_disk_space.description: Flags passed to jlumbroso/free-disk-space to reclaim runner disk before large Docker builds.

enabled.description: Whether any devcontainer-mode scenarios exist for this feature.

scenarios.description: Scenario keys to run in devcontainer mode, one GHA job each.

enabled.description: Whether any standalone-mode scenarios exist for this feature.

scenarios.description: Scenario keys to run in standalone mode, one GHA job each.

enabled.description: Whether any macOS scenarios exist for this feature.

scenarios.description: macOS scenarios, one GHA job each on a fresh native runner.

runner.description: GHA runs-on label for the macOS runner.

test_lib.description: Config slice for the test-lib reusable workflow (shell library unit tests).

enabled.description: Whether to run any library unit test jobs.

linux_enabled.description: Whether the Linux container matrix (test-lib-linux) should run.

macos_enabled.description: Whether native macOS unit tests (test-lib-macos) should run.

ci_image.description: Full devcontainer image URI used as the job container.

artifact_src_name.description: Name of the source artifact downloaded by lib test jobs.

artifact_src_path.description: Local path where the source artifact is extracted.

linux_matrix.description: Linux distro environments to run unit tests against, sourced from test/lib/scenarios.yaml.

items.description: A single Linux unit test environment.

name.description: Human-readable environment name used in the job display name.

env.description: Docker image reference for the test container.

macos_matrix.description: macOS runners to run unit tests on natively, sourced from test/environments.yaml.

items.description: A single macOS unit test runner.

runner.description: GHA runs-on label for the macOS runner.

clean_path.description: Whether to strip GHA pre-installed tools from PATH before running tests.

test_install.description: Config slice for the test-install reusable workflow (install framework unit tests).

enabled.description: Whether to run install framework test jobs.

linux_enabled.description: Whether the Linux container matrix (test-install-linux) should run.

ci_image.description: Full devcontainer image URI used as the job container.

artifact_src_name.description: Name of the source artifact downloaded by install test jobs.

artifact_src_path.description: Local path where the source artifact is extracted.

linux_matrix.description: Linux distro environments for install framework tests, from test/install/scenarios.yaml.

items.description: A single Linux install test environment.

name.description: Human-readable environment name used in the job display name.

env.description: Docker image reference for the test container.

deploy.description: Config slice for the deploy reusable workflow (GHCR publish, GitHub Release, GitHub Pages deploy).

enabled.description: Whether to run the deploy pipeline; true only when at least one feature has an untagged version on main.

features.description: Features to release, each with its version string and the git tag to create.

kind.description: Release kind: always 'feature' for entries in this list.

tag.description: Annotated git tag to create, e.g. install-git/1.2.3.

lib_release.description: Library release entry; enabled is false when no library release is needed.

enabled.description: Whether a library release should be created on this run.

version.description: Library version string, e.g. 0.1.0. Empty string when enabled is false.

tag.description: Git tag to create, e.g. lib/0.1.0. Empty string when enabled is false.

artifact_src_name.description: Name of the source artifact downloaded for GHCR publish.

artifact_src_path.description: Local path where the source artifact is extracted.

artifact_dist_name.description: Name of the distribution artifact downloaded for GitHub Release upload.

artifact_dist_path.description: Local path where the distribution artifact is extracted.

features_src_path.description: Path passed to devcontainers/action base-path-to-features for GHCR publish.

registry.description: Container registry hostname used for docker/login-action during GHCR publish.

git_bot_name.description: Git user.name for annotated tag commits.

git_bot_email.description: Git user.email for annotated tag commits.

pages_environment.description: GitHub Actions environment name used by the GitHub Pages deployment job.

artifact.description: A GitHub Actions artifact: its name, the local path it maps to, and how long to retain it.

name.description: Artifact name used with actions/upload-artifact and actions/download-artifact.

path.description: Local filesystem path the artifact is uploaded from or downloaded to.

retention_days.description: Number of days before GitHub automatically deletes the artifact.
